reasons: Natalia can search for and punish Hanzo's real body while he plays through Demon Pneuma.
Hanzo becomes much weaker when enemies can invade his hidden body position.

proof.summary: Hanzo wants to keep his real body hidden while the demon fights, while Natalia can pressure fog areas and punish the body if she finds it.
worksBestWhen: Natalia tracks the direction Hanzo's demon came from.
failureCases: Hanzo hides body under tower or near teammates.
Natalia guesses the wrong body location.
Natalia is revealed before reaching Hanzo.

reasons: Hilda can invade early, check bushes, and pressure Hanzo's jungle path.
Her durability lets her contest Hanzo's body search better than fragile heroes.

proof.summary: Hanzo wants free jungle tempo and hidden body safety, while Hilda can invade bushes and jungle entrances to deny safe demon usage.
worksBestWhen: Hilda tracks Hanzo's buff and demon timing.
failureCases: Hilda invades alone into multiple enemies.
Hanzo hides body too deep behind his team.
Hilda's team does not convert the opened vision.

reasons: Yi Sun-shin can reveal enemy positions globally, reducing Hanzo's hidden-body advantage.
His reveal helps the team decide where to collapse when Hanzo's demon appears.

proof.summary: Hanzo relies on hidden body positioning, while Yi Sun-shin's global reveal can expose enemy positions and help teammates locate Hanzo's real body.
worksBestWhen: Yi Sun-shin uses reveal after Hanzo sends Demon Pneuma.
Teammates are ready to collapse on the revealed position.
failureCases: Reveal is used with no teammate close enough to punish.
Hanzo hides under turret or near allies.
The team chases demon form instead of body.

reasons: Aldous's global vision can help identify Hanzo's real-body location.
If Hanzo's body is exposed and isolated, Aldous can punish it with chase pressure.

proof.summary: Hanzo wants to hide his body, while Aldous can reveal enemy positions and threaten isolated targets with Contract: Chase Fate.
worksBestWhen: Aldous uses ultimate after Hanzo's demon appears.
Hanzo's body is far from teammates.
failureCases: Hanzo stays protected near base, turret, or allies.
Aldous dives into a prepared trap.
Aldous lacks damage or stacks to finish.

reasons: Selena can use traps and long-range arrow angles to control Hanzo's likely body routes.
Her early roam pressure can punish Hanzo before he gets free jungle tempo.

proof.summary: Hanzo wants safe hidden routes, while Selena can place traps, scout paths, and punish predictable body locations with Abyssal Arrow.
worksBestWhen: Selena places traps around jungle exits and body hiding spots.
Selena coordinates with teammates before invading.
failureCases: Selena traps the wrong side of the map.
Selena misses arrow and loses invade tempo.
